content:
## Grading Pipeline Performance v3 — Design Decisions (2026-04-02)

Four performance optimizations decided for `dorea grade`:

### 1. Motion-Adaptive Depth Interpolation
- Skip depth inference for frames visually similar to previous keyframe
- Compute normalized MSE between proxy frames in Rust, before IPC
- Keyframe forced on: MSE > threshold (0.005), max interval exceeded (12 frames), or scene cut (MSE > 10x threshold)
- Linearly interpolate depth maps for non-keyframe frames using lookahead buffer
- Buffer overflow safety valve at 1.5x max_interval
- Edge cases: frame 0 always keyframe, trailing frames use last keyframe depth
- Expected savings: 4-12x fewer depth inference calls

### 2. Fused LAB Pass (Ambiance + Warmth) with Rayon
- Merge depth_aware_ambiance + user warmth into single RGB→LAB→RGB roundtrip
- Parallelized with rayon par_chunks_exact_mut
- Clarity pass stays separate (CUDA kernel already handles it)
- Output is NOT bit-exact with old pipeline (accepted color-science tradeoff, ΔE < 2)
- Eliminates ~1.45B redundant FLOPs per 4K frame

### 3. Raw RGB IPC Protocol
- Replace PNG encode/decode with raw RGB bytes for both depth AND RAUNE requests
- Format field in protocol is backward-compatible (defaults to "png" if absent)
- Byte format: raw interleaved RGB, uint8, row-major, no padding
- At proxy 518x292, raw is ~453KB — negligible vs PNG ~460KB

### 4. HF Processor Bypass + GPU-Required Runtime
- Replace AutoImageProcessor with direct tensor construction using known ImageNet constants
- CUDA is now a hard requirement for `dorea grade` — no silent CPU fallback
- Clarity kernel failure also becomes hard error (was silently swallowed)
- Python depth model hard-errors if CUDA unavailable
- CPU code retained for cargo test only

### Review Panel Findings
Reviewed by 5 personas (SWE, QA, PM, Video Pipeline Specialist, Performance Engineer):
- Scene-cut ghosting resolved via forced keyframe + buffer flush
- LAB fusion color-science tradeoff accepted (not bit-exact, validate ΔE < 2)
- Buffer overflow safety valve added
- HF processor savings revised from 20ms to 5-10ms
- Rayon parallelism added to fused LAB pass

Spec: docs/decisions/2026-04-02-grading-pipeline-perf-v3.md
Plan: docs/plans/2026-04-02-grading-pipeline-perf-v3.md
